# Pinpoint 311

> Pinpoint 311 is a free, open-source 311 municipal reporting platform for local governments to manage infrastructure requests from residents.

Pinpoint 311 is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit project fiscally sponsored by Hack Club. It provides cities and towns with a modern, AI-powered system to receive, triage, and resolve infrastructure complaints from residents — at zero cost.

## Key Facts
- **Type**: Free, open-source SaaS for local government
- **License**: MIT License
- **Cost**: $0 — completely free for municipalities
- **Status**: 501(c)(3) nonprofit, fiscally sponsored by Hack Club (EIN: 81-2908499)
- **Founder**: Parth Gupta, a student at the Lawrenceville School and resident of West Windsor, NJ
- **Repository**: https://github.com/Pinpoint-311/Pinpoint-311
- **Website**: https://pinpoint311.org

## What It Does
Pinpoint 311 replaces expensive, proprietary 311 systems (like SeeClickFix, GovPilot, CivicPlus) with a free alternative that any municipality can self-host. Residents submit infrastructure reports (potholes, streetlight outages, graffiti, etc.) through a public portal or mobile interface. Staff process these reports through an admin console with AI-powered triage, automatic routing, and real-time analytics.

## Core Features
- **Public Reporting Portal**: Residents submit requests with location, photos, and descriptions
- **AI-Powered Triage**: Google Vertex AI (Gemini) auto-categorizes and prioritizes incoming requests
- **Google Maps Integration**: Geographic visualization of all reports with boundary enforcement
- **Multi-Language Support**: Google Cloud Translation for 100+ languages
- **Staff Admin Console**: Full request lifecycle management, analytics dashboard, staff management
- **Auth0 SSO**: Zero-password staff authentication with MFA and passkeys
- **SMS Notifications**: Twilio-powered status updates to residents
- **Email Confirmations**: Automated email notifications at each status change
- **Self-Hosted**: Runs on any server with Docker. No vendor lock-in.
- **Privacy-First**: All data stays on the municipality's own infrastructure

## Technology Stack
- **Backend**: Python (FastAPI), PostgreSQL, Alembic
- **Frontend**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript (Vite build)
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Docker Compose, Caddy (auto-HTTPS)
- **AI/ML**: Google Vertex AI (Gemini 2.0 Flash)
- **Maps**: Google Maps Platform
- **Auth**: Auth0
- **SMS**: Twilio
- **Deployment**: Single-command Docker deployment with prebuilt images

## Pages
- [Home](https://pinpoint311.org/): Main marketing page with features, pricing comparison, and technical details
- [Get Started](https://pinpoint311.org/get-started): Onboarding wizard and comprehensive setup guide
- [About](https://pinpoint311.org/about): Mission, founder bio, nonprofit status, and values

## Comparison to Alternatives
| Feature | Pinpoint 311 | SeeClickFix | GovPilot |
|---------|-------------|-------------|----------|
| Annual Cost | $0 | $15,000-50,000 | $25,000-80,000 |
| Open Source | Yes (MIT) | No | No |
| AI Triage | Included | Add-on | No |
| Self-Hosted | Yes | No | No |
| Data Ownership | 100% yours | Vendor-held | Vendor-held |
| Multi-Language | 100+ languages | Limited | Limited |
